ip_outcome_note: Card name matches both character names exactly. Art depicts two figures in matching black-and-white conductor uniforms in a transit station — canonical Ingo and Emmet visual signature as Battle Subway bosses in Black and White. PokemonTCG.io confirms card name 'Ingo & Emmet', artist Yusuke Ohmura, Team Up set (sm9-144). Both identity confirmations supported by name match, uniform design, and transit setting.

trivia_bullets.text: Ingo and Emmet are identical twin brothers and co-bosses of the Battle Subway in Unova (Pokemon Black, White, Black 2, White 2). Ingo challenges Single Battle challengers after a 20-win streak; Emmet challenges Double Battle challengers. Their mirrored uniforms — Ingo in dark tones, Emmet in lighter — are their primary visual identity [Bulbapedia: Ingo, via WebSearch snippet].

In Pokemon Legends: Arceus, Ingo appears alone in the ancient Hisui region, having been transported through a space-time rift and suffered near-total memory loss. He becomes a Pearl Clan warden watching over Sneasler. His fragmented memories of Emmet and their partner Pokemon are surfaced through player interaction — one of the franchise's most emotionally resonant secondary character arcs [Bulbapedia: Ingo, via WebSearch snippet; Game Rant: 'Pokemon Legends: Arceus - Who is Ingo?'].
sources: Game Rant: 'Pokemon Legends Arceus - Who is Ingo?' (WebSearch snippet)

trivia_bullets.text: Team Up (sm9) released February 2019 as a Sun and Moon Series set. The TAG TEAM mechanic — pairing two characters on one card — made the Ingo and Emmet Supporter card a natural fit: they appear together on every Battle Subway card in the games and are never depicted separately in their Unova roles [PokemonTCG.io sm9-144].

Ingo and Emmet's Supporter effect — discard hand, then choose to draw 5 from the top or 5 from the bottom of the deck — reflects their subway motif: two lines, two directions, one destination. The choice between top and bottom deck draw is mechanically distinct and sees play in Expanded hand-refresh strategies [PokemonTCG.io sm9-144 oracle text].
